channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: The spring festival, which celebrates the victory of good over evil, also marks the end of winter. #India #Holi #Spring #Colour #BBCNews
item.description: The spring festival, which celebrates the victory of good over evil, also marks the end of winter. #India #Holi #Spring #Colour #BBCNews

item.title: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has described Iranian forces as being "toast" as a result of the "sheer destruction" at the hands of US and Israeli forces. #US #Iran #MiddleEast #PeteHegseth #BBCNews
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has described Iranian forces as being "toast" as a result of the "sheer destruction" at the hands of US and Israeli forces. #US #Iran #MiddleEast #PeteHegseth #BBCNews

item.title: The Comfort Hotel, in Lebanon, sustained serious damage after it was hit by an Israeli air strike, and witnesses say its receptionist was badly injured and taken to hospital. #Beirut #Lebanon #Hotel #BBCNews
item.description: The Comfort Hotel, in Lebanon, sustained serious damage after it was hit by an Israeli air strike, and witnesses say its receptionist was badly injured and taken to hospital. #Beirut #Lebanon #Hotel #BBCNews

item.title: PM Keir Starmer was asked if his response to the week's events had made the UK's relationship with the US "stronger or weaker?" #KeirStarmer #DonaldTrump #Iran #Diplomacy #UKPolitics #BBCNews
item.description: PM Keir Starmer was asked if his response to the week's events had made the UK's relationship with the US "stronger or weaker?" #KeirStarmer #DonaldTrump #Iran #Diplomacy #UKPolitics #BBCNews

item.title: Iran has retaliated to US-Israeli air strikes by firing hundreds of missiles and drones at its Arab neighbours, targeting American military bases on their soil. But in doing so, it is targeting the Gulf's image as a safe hub for travel, tourism and financ
item.description: Iran has retaliated to US-Israeli air strikes by firing hundreds of missiles and drones at its Arab neighbours, targeting American military bases on their soil. But in doing so, it is targeting the Gulf's image as a safe hub for travel, tourism and financ

item.title: Israel has announced new "broad scale" attacks across Tehran, and said it is targeting regime infrastructure. #Tehran #Iran #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: Israel has announced new "broad scale" attacks across Tehran, and said it is targeting regime infrastructure. #Tehran #Iran #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: More chartered flights will be organised for Britons stranded in the Middle East "in the coming days", UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer said, adding eight commercial flights will also be leaving the United Arab Emirates on Wednesday. #Oman #Muscat #Dubai #M
item.description: More chartered flights will be organised for Britons stranded in the Middle East "in the coming days", UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer said, adding eight commercial flights will also be leaving the United Arab Emirates on Wednesday. #Oman #Muscat #Dubai #M

item.title: The UK is still working closely with the US, the government insists, after President Donald Trump said the relationship was "obviously not what it was”. #Iran #UK #US #Politics #BBCNews
item.description: The UK is still working closely with the US, the government insists, after President Donald Trump said the relationship was "obviously not what it was”. #Iran #UK #US #Politics #BBCNews

item.title: Protesters outside OpenAI’s San Francisco headquarters rallied against the company’s Pentagon deal, which was signed shortly after rival Anthropic’s fallout with the Defense Department over concerns about AI use in surveillance and autonomous weapons. Aft
item.description: Protesters outside OpenAI’s San Francisco headquarters rallied against the company’s Pentagon deal, which was signed shortly after rival Anthropic’s fallout with the Defense Department over concerns about AI use in surveillance and autonomous weapons. Aft

item.title: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth says a US submarine sank an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean with a torpedo. It's thought around 180 people were on board the Iris Dena. #Iran #US #Warship #MiddleEast #Torpedo #BBCNews
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth says a US submarine sank an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean with a torpedo. It's thought around 180 people were on board the Iris Dena. #Iran #US #Warship #MiddleEast #Torpedo #BBCNews

item.title: More than 100,000 Britons have registered for UK government help in the Middle East. #MiddleEast #Iran #Israel #US #BBCNews
item.description: More than 100,000 Britons have registered for UK government help in the Middle East. #MiddleEast #Iran #Israel #US #BBCNews

item.title: The UK government will stop issuing study visas to people from Afghanistan, Cameroon, Myanmar and Sudan from this month. #UKGovernment #Visa #StudyVisa #BBCNews
item.description: The UK government will stop issuing study visas to people from Afghanistan, Cameroon, Myanmar and Sudan from this month. #UKGovernment #Visa #StudyVisa #BBCNews

item.title: A petrol forecourt owner told BBC Newsbeat the cost of rising fuel prices caused by the Israel-US war with Iran will have to be passed on to customers soon. #Petrol #Energy #Gas #Prices #US #Iran #Oil #BBCNews
item.description: A petrol forecourt owner told BBC Newsbeat the cost of rising fuel prices caused by the Israel-US war with Iran will have to be passed on to customers soon. #Petrol #Energy #Gas #Prices #US #Iran #Oil #BBCNews

item.title: An Iranian missile has fallen in Qamishli, a city in north-eastern Syria, near Turkey, according to the Turkish defence ministry. #Iran #US #Syria #Turkey #Missile #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: An Iranian missile has fallen in Qamishli, a city in north-eastern Syria, near Turkey, according to the Turkish defence ministry. #Iran #US #Syria #Turkey #Missile #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: X has said it has started suspending accounts which were flooding the platform with fake videos alleging to show situations on the ground in Iran and the Middle East, which they claim "99%" were made to trigger monetisation of the content. #Iran #US #Midd
item.description: X has said it has started suspending accounts which were flooding the platform with fake videos alleging to show situations on the ground in Iran and the Middle East, which they claim "99%" were made to trigger monetisation of the content. #Iran #US #Midd

item.title: The spring festival, which celebrates the victory of good over evil, also marks the end of winter. #Holi #India #Pakistan #Nepal #BBCNews
item.description: The spring festival, which celebrates the victory of good over evil, also marks the end of winter. #Holi #India #Pakistan #Nepal #BBCNews

item.title: US President Donald Trump promised no more wars - but has his stance changed since returning to office for his second term? #Iran #US #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: US President Donald Trump promised no more wars - but has his stance changed since returning to office for his second term? #Iran #US #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Nepal is having its first election since the government was toppled by Gen Z protests. But what do voters care about most now? #NepalElection #Nepal #BBCNews
item.description: Nepal is having its first election since the government was toppled by Gen Z protests. But what do voters care about most now? #NepalElection #Nepal #BBCNews

item.title: The senators have voted 47 to 52 to prevent a measure advancing in the chamber that would limit President Donald Trump's ability to order further military action in Iran. #DonaldTrump #Iran #Senate #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: The senators have voted 47 to 52 to prevent a measure advancing in the chamber that would limit President Donald Trump's ability to order further military action in Iran. #DonaldTrump #Iran #Senate #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: An Instagram post claiming to show a US military jet being pursued by an Iranian missile was viewed millions times - but it was actually from a video game. #Iran #US #MiddleEast #FighterJet #BBCNews
item.description: An Instagram post claiming to show a US military jet being pursued by an Iranian missile was viewed millions times - but it was actually from a video game. #Iran #US #MiddleEast #FighterJet #BBCNews

item.title: Cars may get messy. 😬 #UKWeather #SaharanDust #Sunset #BBCNews
item.description: Cars may get messy. 😬 #UKWeather #SaharanDust #Sunset #BBCNews

item.title: Last December up to 16,000 homes went without water for almost a week, while in January about 30,000 properties faced issues. #SouthEastWater #Regulator #Water #England #Sussex #Kent #BBCNews
item.description: Last December up to 16,000 homes went without water for almost a week, while in January about 30,000 properties faced issues. #SouthEastWater #Regulator #Water #England #Sussex #Kent #BBCNews

item.title: Cuba has been hit by a wave of power cuts in recent years, but chronic fuel shortages have been worsened by a US blockade on oil from key ally Venezuela since January. #Cuba #Blackout #US #Venezuela #BBCNews
item.description: Cuba has been hit by a wave of power cuts in recent years, but chronic fuel shortages have been worsened by a US blockade on oil from key ally Venezuela since January. #Cuba #Blackout #US #Venezuela #BBCNews

item.title: Nearly all airspace in the Middle East has been closed following the United States-Israeli attacks on Iran. A second flight directly to Dublin from Dubai is scheduled for Thursday. #Dublin #Dubai #Ireland #UAE #Iran #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews
item.description: Nearly all airspace in the Middle East has been closed following the United States-Israeli attacks on Iran. A second flight directly to Dublin from Dubai is scheduled for Thursday. #Dublin #Dubai #Ireland #UAE #Iran #MiddleEast #News #BBCNews

item.title: Elon Musk told a court in San Francisco that he was "simply speaking my mind" when posting on Twitter in the run up to him buying the platform. Investors have accused him of trying to manipulate markets. #ElonMusk #Twitter #SanFrancisco #News #BBCNews
item.description: Elon Musk told a court in San Francisco that he was "simply speaking my mind" when posting on Twitter in the run up to him buying the platform. Investors have accused him of trying to manipulate markets. #ElonMusk #Twitter #SanFrancisco #News #BBCNews

item.title: In Iran, blasts have again been reported in the capital Tehran while there have been more deadly Israeli air strikes in Lebanon. #Israel #Iran #US #MiddleEast #BBCNews
item.description: In Iran, blasts have again been reported in the capital Tehran while there have been more deadly Israeli air strikes in Lebanon. #Israel #Iran #US #MiddleEast #BBCNews

item.title: Lebanese media reported last night that three people had been killed and six others injured after two strikes near the capital. New strikes were reported in southern Beirut - a Hezbollah stronghold - this morning. Israel earlier said it hit "several comma
item.description: Lebanese media reported last night that three people had been killed and six others injured after two strikes near the capital. New strikes were reported in southern Beirut - a Hezbollah stronghold - this morning. Israel earlier said it hit "several comma

item.title: The chartered flight was meant to leave Muscat International Airport in Oman at 23:00 local time on Wednesday, but remains grounded. #Oman #Muscat #MiddleEast #UKGovernment #News #BBCNews
item.description: The chartered flight was meant to leave Muscat International Airport in Oman at 23:00 local time on Wednesday, but remains grounded. #Oman #Muscat #MiddleEast #UKGovernment #News #BBCNews

item.title: London's Metropolitan Police have not done enough to protect women and girls in the five years since the murder of Sarah Everard, Baroness Louise Casey said. #SarahEverard #Women #WomensSafety #WomenandGirls #MetPolice #BBCNews
item.description: London's Metropolitan Police have not done enough to protect women and girls in the five years since the murder of Sarah Everard, Baroness Louise Casey said. #SarahEverard #Women #WomensSafety #WomenandGirls #MetPolice #BBCNews

item.title: A fifth of the world's oil and gas flows through the Strait of Hormuz, a narrow waterway wedged between Iran and the United Arab Emirates, but traffic has almost entirely halted since the start of the US-Israel war with Iran. #Israel #Iran #US #StraitOfHo
item.description: A fifth of the world's oil and gas flows through the Strait of Hormuz, a narrow waterway wedged between Iran and the United Arab Emirates, but traffic has almost entirely halted since the start of the US-Israel war with Iran. #Israel #Iran #US #StraitOfHo
